events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: residential job, fireblocking & draftstopping, observed open stud bays at floor transitions, rough-complete. Reference IRC R302. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Open stud bays at floor transitions likely violate fireblocking/draftstopping requirements. Need determine applicable code. IRC R302 Fire-Resistant Construction. R302.4 Fireblocking and draftstopping. In wood-frame construction, fireblocking required to cut off concealed draft openings between stories and between top story and roof/attic. Also draftstopping in certain occupancies. For residential, open stud bays at floor transitions mean vertical concealed spaces are not blocked, allowing fire/draft to spread between floors. At floor transitions, fireblocking is required at each floor level perpendicular to studs. So non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk high (fire spread). Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 50? Work roughed in but missing critical fireblocking. Value 0. Sound_source etc default empty string/0. Findings: open stud bays at floor transitions lack required fireblocking/draftstopping; concealed vertical openings allow flame/draft spread between floors. Actions: install approved fireblocking material at floor line in each stud bay per IRC R302.4; inspect prior to close-in. Rationale: IRC requires fireblocking at floor levels to prevent concealed draft openings; observed open bays violate. References: IRC R302.4. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.
